prompt: I'm working on the flask-apcore demo project at /Users/tercelyi/Workspace/aipartnerup/flask-apcore/examples/demo/. I want to know how good the module metadata quality is. Please assess all the .binding.yaml files in the apcore_modules/ directory and give me a detailed quality report with per-module scores.

assertions.text: Report includes scores for all 5 modules (list_tasks.get, create_task.post, get_task.get, update_task.put, delete_task.delete)
Each module score breaks down into 7 dimensions: description, schema descriptions, documentation, annotations, examples, tags, intent metadata
list_tasks.get scores highest among the 5 modules (it has readonly+cacheable annotations AND no input properties = vacuous 25 for schema)
create_task.post scores lowest or near-lowest (all default annotations, 3 params with no descriptions)
Report identifies common issues across modules (e.g., missing schema descriptions, no examples, no x-when-to-use)
